mentions.note: Recent capital raise pressured stock but has not fallen enough. Stock acts heavy with lot for sale; wait for better entry before accumulating.
Down 30% from $26 in January; at $18 reconsidering—growth rate supports lower valuation; need more time/earnings clarity before buying.

Digital bank with 37% revenue growth, 160% earnings growth, 54% 2026 EPS growth; CEO Anthony Noto proven; 30%+ CAGR through 2028; AI-proof federal charter; cross-selling driving member loyalty; PEG 6 at $18 is steal.
Posted first billion-dollar quarter, strong growth, 9 straight quarters GAAP profitability; CEO Anthony Noto bought shares twice in March; Cramer is 'believer' despite past controversy.
Down to $15 from $50 history—caller shocked at low price. Cramer: others liked it higher; run strategy okay. Implied reduce/sell posture.

Beat earnings with 41% revenue growth, 18 consecutive quarters beating Rule of 40. Did not raise on rate uncertainty, but growing 30%+ revenue, 40% earnings. Trump account positioned as alternative trustee; long-term tech platform thesis intact.
Time to buy at current 18 level after rejection at 28 and pullback from highs. Fintech thesis intact; continue to believe this level is attractive entry.
